message:
feat(diagnostics): add secret-safe diagnostic redaction module (ft-e34d9.10.7.5)

Three-layer redaction for runtime diagnostics: secret-pattern scanning,
structural field masking, and privacy budget enforcement. Prevents leakage
of credentials and sensitive content while preserving triage utility.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
